message:
feat(fnp-python): conformance_binary_math.rs harness (4 tests, 53 cases)

Tests native binary math functions against NumPy oracle:
- hypot: 25 cases including Pythagorean triples, inf/nan, extreme values
- copysign: 25 cases including sign combinations, +/-0.0, inf/nan
- Broadcasting: hypot with mismatched shapes
- Empty array edge cases for both functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
